raw_text: Netskope was notified about a potential gap in its Endpoint DLP Module for Netskope Client on Windows systems. The successful exploitation of the gap can potentially allow a privileged user to trigger an integer overflow within the DLL Injector, leading to a Blue-Screen-of-Death (BSOD). Successful exploitation would require the Endpoint DLP module to be enabled in the client configuration. A successful exploit can potentially result in a denial-of-service for the local machine.
